analysis.reasoning: Core message: A diplomatic tweet welcoming the new Dominican Republic Permanent Representative, highlighting valued bilateral relations and cooperation in the UN Security Council, and expressing intent to strengthen UN cooperation. Evaluation: CH1 (West immoral/hostile): Not referenced; no criticism of the West. CH2 (China is a benevolent power): Yes—emphasizes cooperation, multilateral engagement, and strengthening ties within the UN framework, portraying China as cooperative and constructive internationally. CH3 (epic history): Not mentioned. CH4 (appropriate political system/values): Not discussed; focus is external diplomacy, not domestic system/values. CH5 (CCP government succeeds): No claims about domestic achievements or leadership. CH6 (culture/nature/heritage): Not relevant. Conclusion: The tweet promotes CH2.
